title: GitHub Webhook Consumer: HMAC-SHA256 + Events → sync_outbox
description:
GitHub-Webhook-Handler mit HMAC-SHA256-Validierung, parallel zum GitLab-Consumer.

**Dateien:**
- `app/services/github_webhook_handler.py` — Event-Normalisierung + Mapping
- Erweiterung von `app/routers/webhooks.py` — `POST /api/webhooks/github` Endpoint

**HMAC-SHA256 Validierung:**
- Header: `X-Hub-Signature-256` (Format: `sha256=<hex-digest>`)
- Secret: `HIVEMIND_GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` Env-Var
- Payload: Raw Body (bytes), NICHT geparstes JSON
- `hmac.compare_digest()` für timing-safe Vergleich
- 401 bei ungültiger Signatur

**Event-Mapping (10 Event-Typen):**
| GitHub Event (X-GitHub-Event) | Action | event_type |
|---|---|---|
| `issues` | opened/reopened | `github_issue_opened` |
| `issues` | closed | `github_issue_closed` |
| `pull_request` | opened | `github_pr_opened` |
| `pull_request` | closed (merged=true) | `github_pr_merged` |
| `check_run` | completed (conclusion=failure) | `github_check_failed` |
| `check_suite` | completed (conclusion=failure) | `github_ci_failed` |
| `push` | — | `github_push` |
| `workflow_run` | completed | `github_workflow_completed` |
| `projects_v2_item` | edited/created | `github_project_item_changed` |
| `release` | published | `github_release` |

**Normalisierung:**
- `normalize_github_event(event_type: str, action: str, payload: dict) -> NormalizedEvent`
- match/case Pattern-Matching für Event-Typ + Action-Kombination
- Schreibt in sync_outbox: `direction='inbound', system='github', routing_state='unrouted'`

**MCP Read-Tools:**
- `hivemind-get_github_pr` — PR-Details via GitHub REST API
- `hivemind-get_github_issue` — Issue-Details
- `hivemind-get_github_check_status` — Check-Suite Status für Commit
- Alle read-only, Auth: `HIVEMIND_GITHUB_TOKEN` als Bearer

**Env-Vars:** `HIVEMIND_GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `HIVEMIND_GITHUB_TOKEN`, `HIVEMIND_GITHUB_URL` (Default: `https://api.github.com`)

criteria: 401 bei ungültiger Signatur, 400 bei fehlendem Header
Alle 10 Event-Typen werden korrekt normalisiert und ins sync_outbox geschrieben
